commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer label, overlapping open fix PR, and missing real behavior proof require maintainer selection/validation rather than an automated repair job.; Cleared: The diff only filters in-memory node catalog metadata and adds a focused test/changelog entry; it introduces no concrete security or supply-chain regression. commands.review_summary:
The PR filters non-string live node catalog capability and command entries before trimming/sorting, adds a regression test, and records the gateway fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. Source inspection gives a clear catalog-level repro for malformed `NodeSession` arrays, but the full live WebSocket path needs runtime proof because the connect schema already requires string array entries.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer label, overlapping open fix PR, and missing real behavior proof require maintainer selection/validation rather than an automated repair job.
